subTitle: Khayaal Rakhna

title: Meri Ramma Sabse Special
subTitle: Vikrant returns home after 15 years, confronting unresolved tensions with his mother. He faces painful truths and rekindles old wounds, searching for answers to heal their fractured relationship. However, Vikrant must reconcile with his past to build a brighter future.

title: Hausla
subTitle: Hausla

title: Khwahishon Ki Car
subTitle: Khwahishon Ki Car

title: Laxmi
subTitle: A maid is shocked to find the owner of the house where she works dead. Upon telling her partner, he plans a scheme to rob the house.

title: Nazariya
subTitle: The host sheds light on some of the most latest news, developments and current affairs pertaining to various issues of public and national interest.

title: Kidnapped
subTitle: Shruti, a spoiled rich girl, dislikes her father's strict behaviour towards her. Later, she and her boyfriend, Aakash, devise a plan to kidnap her to help her escape his strict parenting.

title: Dimming Shadows
subTitle: Dimming Shadows

title: Kshan
subTitle: Kshan

title: L'idiot
subTitle: L'idiot

title: Meera
subTitle: A mother calls out to her daughter, only to be scolded by her husband. Her daughter, Meera, is a special child who cannot speak or hear, yet her mother sends her to school with hope. Despite the chaos and negativity around her, Meera remains unaware, finding beauty and positivity in everything.

title: Mingi
subTitle: Mingi

title: Late Night Taxi
subTitle: A young Delhi woman's safety is at stake when she books a taxi and travels alone through the lonely roads for returning home late at night.

title: Laali
subTitle: Laali

title: My Mothers Last Birthday Gift
subTitle: A woman with terminal lung cancer helps her seven-year-old son develop the emotional strength to live his life without her.

title: Happily Married Part 2
subTitle: Rani and Animesh, a couple who is having an affair with Jimmy plan to meet him on Saturday. The story unfolds as their meeting with Jimmy doesn't go as planned.

title: Half Cake
subTitle: A poor single mother struggles fiercely to earn the extra money needed to fulfill her child's simple wish for a cake just like the one he saw in a shop.

title: Just Take It Easy
subTitle: CEO Sanjay, who is unhappy despite his wealth, hosts Oberoi Industries' success party. He invites his girlfriend Priyanka, a model, promising to make her the company's face.

title: Funkaar
subTitle: Through her daughter's gentle urging, a mother rediscovers her forgotten artistic passion, escaping the monotony of her routine.

title: Jama Punji
subTitle: A late night conversation between a mother (Sarla) & her son Anshuman, 13 days after the passing of his father where they discuss the reasons for his detachment from his father and how by the end of the night, certain events lead Anshuman to accept and make amends with his deceased father.

title: Harela
subTitle: In the heart of Uttarakhand, an elderly woman and a young man navigate the divide between heritage and progress. As a local festival begins, they must decide the future of their traditions.

title: Harmless
subTitle: A boy in need of money to make it big in life and a girl who is looking for thrill concoct a plan and stage a kidnapping to extort money from the girl's rich father.

subTitle: Hack-her

subTitle: A writer who is struggling with writer's block is in search of a story. However, he lands himself in trouble when he stumbles upon a deadly secret while talking to his garbage collector.

subTitle: Fate plays a twisted game with Harshit and Rahila, who are madly in love with each other.

title: Hearts Awash In Sapphire Light
subTitle: Hearts Awash in Sapphire Light unfolds the tale of two individuals who encounter each other one evening, initially under less-than-ideal circumstances. At first, they engage in petty arguments over trivial matters. However, as time passes, the undeniable power of their connection becomes evident, serving as a poignant reminder that sometimes, the most extraordinary journeys take place within the depths of our own hearts.

title: Holding Back
subTitle: Holding Back

title: Hum Types
subTitle: Despite different social classes, Charu and Makrand find unexpected common ground, as their growing connection reveals shared struggles and emotions.

title: Hey Listen!
subTitle: Dhruv and Vidya get in touch and decide to meet each other a few years after their breakup. However, their meeting soon takes an unfortunate turn as old conflicts and emotions gradually come to the surface, causing them to get into a heated argument.

title: Abnormal
subTitle: A mother fights for her transgender son's future and freedom, striving for acceptance and harmony from her family and society.

subTitle: A young couple on their first date with the excitement of their first kiss does not find a private moment in the crowded city of Mumbai.

subTitle: Khusboo suffers from a socially taboo medical condition leading to a presentation blunder. Subsequently, she finds the courage to regain her confidence and fight the anathema.

title: Jaane Do Mujhe
subTitle: During a seemingly pleasant date with Aditya, arranged by her friends, Nisha hears a concerning noise from the washroom. She discovers Aditya unconscious on the floor and immediately calls her friend Priya for help. Surprisingly, Priya dismisses Nisha's concerns, suggesting it's all imaginary. This unexpected response casts doubt on Aditya's existence and the reality of the entire situation, leaving Nisha confused about what's real and what might be a product of her imagination.

title: Dubki
subTitle: Dubki is a story based on a true incident of a female constable in male-dominated law enforcement. Despite being a tough and dominant constable at the Lalkurti police station, Ganga Yadav was troubled several times by SHO Durgesh Mishra. Ganga complained about it to the IPS officer and asked for a transfer; however, he refused to help her. The female constable was left with no other choice but to take justice into her own hands.

title: Firni
subTitle: Firni

title: Dwand
subTitle: Ruby, raised to believe in her potential, however, finds herself married to a traditional man, Vivek. After motherhood, she decides to pursue an advertising career, sparking unforeseen troubles.

title: Duty
subTitle: Individuals from different walks of life and social classes demonstrate the interdependence of each social stratum on the other through their duties and responsibilities.

title: Cycle Of Sorrows
subTitle: Set in a rural village, this heart-wrenching story follows a poor father with a beloved daughter, who still yearns for a son as his pregnant wife prepares to give birth. Driven by financial hardship, he makes a tragic decision that not only shatters his family but leaves his relationship with his daughter and wife forever scarred. Watch this emotional tale of a father's regret and the lasting impact on his family. Can he undo the damage he's caused?

subTitle: A light bulb falls in love with a human.

subTitle: Against the setting of a journey to Thailand, Ayush, a lustful businessman, possesses both the capability and cleverness to be unfaithful to his wife and shatter her aspirations of moving to Canada. Yet, the question remains: Can he thwart her pursuit of realizing her dreams?

subTitle: As a family decides to go for a drive, the father stays adamant on driving. His views on technology lead him to not trust navigational systems, but he himself struggles with directions.

subTitle: Are we using social media to expand our horizon or are we overusing it and unknowingly desensitizing ourselves? Faboo explores this aspect of social media and nudges us to think about it through this story of a mother and son.

subTitle: Dhoop Haskar Boli

title: First Sin
subTitle: What would you do if you unexpectedly obtain magical powers? Ashwath, a failed businessman is having a troubled relationship with his wife. One fine morning he gets a Sand-timer at his doorstep. Life takes a turn when he discovers magical powers in it. Will the Sand-timer be a boon or curse?
